title: Rainbow Slime
description: Adds colored slimes that drop colored slime balls. Vanilla friendly.
body:
Simply adds colored slimes that drop colored slime balls for decorative purposes.

Config file for chance at replacing a vanilla slime with a random colored slime.
Vanilla crafting works with all colors!
Clear color from slimeballs for mod compatibility!
Dye any slime any color for ultimate customization and no reliance on RNG

![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1zAtsDOA/images/1e838635025a0fa8d81f7674130062d473070f77.png)
